activities.name: Ashton Gardens
activities.description: A 50-acre botanical garden featuring themed gardens, walking paths, waterfalls, and seasonal events.

activities.name: Curiosity Farms
activities.description: A family-friendly farm attraction offering animal encounters, educational experiences, and seasonal activities.

activities.name: Museum of Ancient Life
activities.description: One of the largest dinosaur museums in the world, featuring fossils, interactive exhibits, and life-sized dinosaur displays.

activities.name: Butterfly Biosphere
activities.description: An interactive butterfly conservatory where visitors can experience thousands of butterflies and learn about insects and ecosystems.

activities.name: Monte L. Bean Life Science Museum
activities.description: A natural history museum featuring wildlife exhibits, taxidermy collections, and educational programs.

activities.name: UVU Museum of Art
activities.description: Utah Valley University's art museum showcasing contemporary and traditional works by regional and international artists.

activities.name: BYU Museum of Art
activities.description: A major university art museum featuring rotating exhibitions, American art, and international collections.

activities.name: Bridal Veil Falls
activities.description: A scenic 607-foot waterfall accessible by a paved trail in Provo Canyon.

activities.name: Roots of Knowledge
activities.description: A massive stained-glass art installation at UVU depicting the history of human knowledge and achievement.

activities.name: Mount Timpanogos Trail
activities.address: Timpooneke Trailhead, American Fork Canyon, UT 84003
activities.description: A challenging mountain trail leading to the summit of Mount Timpanogos with alpine scenery and wildlife viewing opportunities.

activities.name: Utah Lake State Park
activities.description: A popular destination for boating, fishing, kayaking, paddleboarding, and lakeside recreation.

activities.name: Nickel City
activities.cost: Low-cost admission; games require nickels or game card
activities.description: A family arcade featuring classic and modern games, redemption prizes, and affordable entertainment.

activities.name: Scratch Mini Golf
activities.description: An indoor mini golf attraction featuring creative courses, interactive elements, and family-friendly entertainment.

activities.name: Splash Summit Waterpark
activities.description: A family-friendly water park featuring water slides, a lazy river, splash zones, swimming pools, and attractions for all ages.

activities.name: Ruth and Nathan Hale Theater
activities.description: A professional theater company known for family-friendly productions, musicals, comedies, and classic stage performances.
